purpose: Convert an HR/source-safe payload into protected import/read candidates for shopper profiles, certifications, liquidations, payment batches, audit events and reviewQueue without writing Firestore or exposing sensitive data.

acceptedPayloads: source-safe JSON export from HR live builder

shopperPublicRefs.notes: Public/source-safe refs only; no complete shopper profile.

shopperIdentityLinkCandidates.notes: Candidate identity links for later human review or protected import.

certificationCarryoverCandidates.notes: Preserve already presented certifications as candidates before requesting retake.

protectedLiquidationCandidates.notes: Payment-control candidates only; no payment execution and no raw banking data.

protectedPaymentBatchCandidates.notes: Prepared batch candidates for finance review, not real payment.

reviewQueueCandidates.notes: Conflicts and ambiguity candidates; no silent overwrite.

auditEventCandidates.notes: Source-safe audit candidates for dry-run/import planning.

claudePrototypeImpact.notes: Prototype must represent generic source-safe to protected-candidate flow without hardcoding a tenant/project or exposing private data.

topics: why source-safe candidates are not production imports
how certifications and liquidations are preserved without exposing PII
